section_miscategorizations.text: The cat scan order has been placed.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Placing an order is a management action and belongs in the Plan, not in Objective findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: Order a cat scan of the right shoulder.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is correctly a Plan item, but it conflicts with the earlier Objective statement that the CT order has already been placed; the temporal inconsistency is organizational rather than a section misplacement.
